title: Aquila - Complete Edition
body:
![Preview 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc1b1b0637d704efcf2d2e43c7d2b8d91a3abd85.png)

# **Aquila Mod**

## Warning!
**Latest version named "Aquila-1.2.0-1.20.1-complete" is incompatible with the all other Aquila modules as they are integrated in this edition.**


The Aquila mod adds a great variety of building blocks and furniture to your beloved Minecraft world. It is designed to enhance immersion in your medieval / fantasy worlds. 
From new floor blocks to new furniture Aquila will help you to create your vision. 

You can find older versions [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquila).

This mod currently supports Fabric 1.20.1. A Forge version is under development by Vaex.


## Content

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## Furniture:
- Many different furniture objects, including chairs, beds, tables and others. 

![Preview 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/154aa7303e4270584f957a1e3fb4a186fc6bd2f5.png)


## Building Blocks:
- New building blocks in different variants.

![Preview 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4c422632412ed7072eae5d8b64f1a8df1c89f9a.png)


## Aquila Palette Wheel
- Provided by the library mod Aquila Core this wheel allows you to access block variants of certain blocks by pressing "C" (default - can be changed) while in creative mode. This will greatly enhance your options to swap between different block options without effort. 

![Aquila Palette Wheel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33435d93bea8bbaa073fa16e7bb69b12f34f8fca_0.webp)


## Cycle & Shelf Interaction
- Some blocks now have the following tooltips: "Can Cycle" or "Cycle and Shelf Interaction". 
- Blocks that can cycle change their "cycle" blockstate when right clicked with the same block in hand. 
- Blocks with shelf interaction can be placed "into" shelves. Just place those blocks in front of a shelf by clicking on the upper part just as you would place a slab block on top. 


## Ore Generation
- Ores added by Aquila can generate in the world. By default this is set to false. You can find the config through Mod Menu or in your configs folder. 

</details>


## Installation
Ensure you are using Fabric Loader 0.16.5 or higher to experience all features Aquila Mod has to offer. The latest version - 1.2.0 - no longer requires Aquila Core and also integrates Aquila Paintings. Make also sure to download Continuity for connected textures. 


## Mod recommendations
While Aquila is already great on its own these mods are highly recommended: 
- [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- [KeybindsGalore Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/keybindsgaloreplus) to manage double keybindings, especially if using Aquila together with Conquest Reforged. 
- Or another key binding alternative: [Keybind Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/keybind-fix)
